sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 70:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 70:1
items.html: The place of the screen and the coupling is called Yesod. Hence, the phase of bottom Hey in the Nikvey Einayim of Keter of Nekudim is called Yesod of he Keter. When the Yesod of Keter is above HB, their YHV became the phase of HGT. However, when the Yesod of Keter, which is the bottom Hey, is extended below the YHV as Kamatz, then HB return to the Rosh, and YHV, which were HGT, now become HBD. It follows that through the Yesod of Keter, Tifferet, which is Vav, becomes the phase of Daat. Thus, Yesod of the upper one becomes Daat in the lower one, since Tifferet is turned into Daat through the Yesod of Keter which is extended to the place of the Vav of HB, which is Tifferet. (Inner Light, Item 30)
